inputs.prompt: A beautiful woman, wearing an elegant red long dress, a wide-brimmed black straw hat, and bright red lips. Overlapping multi-layered plant shadows create a unique visual depth and dynamism. The main visual elements may have multiple different angles and transparencies to enhance the three-dimensionality and layering. The dark green background is simple, with a sense of art and storytelling. It is a poster integrated with shadow overlapping effects. The overall design is mysterious and full of artistic sense. Photography, masterful composition,
